headline: Luka Vuskovic
body: Luka Vuskovic is being linked with a move to Brighton.
text:
Brighton have made a second offer for Luka Vuskovic worth £45m, and offered Spurs a sell-on.

Vuskovic remains keen on the move.🇭🇷
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report
RUMOUR | Luka Vuskovic

Luka Vuskovic is being linked with a move to Brighton.

To: Brighton
